statement: In every magma, Equation 2386 (`x = (y * (z * (y * y))) * y`) implies Equation 120 (`x = y * ((x * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0658
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op y y))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) x))
